title: 🔥 BMRI高位难改，机构入场谨慎
body: 市场处于避险横盘。BMRI维持70，风险偏好低位。嘉信理财入场吸引机构资金，但BMRI高位显示资金仍倾向避险。中性偏空。机构资金何时主导市场？
title_en: 🔥 BMRI Remains Elevated, Institutional Entry Cautious
body_en: Market is in a risk-off consolidation. BMRI holds steady at 70, signaling low risk appetite. While Charles Schwab's entry attracts institutional funds, the elevated BMRI indicates capital is still flowing to safety. Neutral, leaning bearish. When will institutional capital take the lead?
